CREATE   VIEW dbo.vw_AvailableVehicleStock
AS
SELECT vs.Id, vs.ItemId, vs.ChassisNo, vs.EngineNo, vs.CarTypeId, vs.CarModelId, vs.CarColorId, vs.ManufacturingYear, vs.PlateNo, vs.VehicleNotes,
       vs.PurchaseInvoiceId, vs.PurchaseInvoiceDetailId, vs.PurchaseDate, vs.PurchaseCost, vs.WarehouseId, vs.BranchId,
       ct.ArName AS CarTypeName, cm.ArName AS CarModelName, cc.ArName AS CarColorName, w.ArName AS WarehouseName
FROM dbo.VehicleStock vs
LEFT JOIN dbo.CarType ct ON ct.Id = vs.CarTypeId
LEFT JOIN dbo.CarModel cm ON cm.Id = vs.CarModelId
LEFT JOIN dbo.CarColor cc ON cc.Id = vs.CarColorId
LEFT JOIN dbo.Warehouse w ON w.Id = vs.WarehouseId
WHERE vs.IsDeleted = 0 AND vs.VehicleStatusId = 1;

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[vw_PropertyBatchDetailed]
AS
SELECT 
    pb.Id,
    pb.MainDocId,
    p.Code AS PropertyCode,
    p.ArName AS PropertyName,
    pb.BatchNo,
    pb.BatchDate,
    
    -- القيم الأساسية
    pb.BatchValueBeforeDiscount,
    pb.Discount,
    pb.BatchValueAfterDiscount,
    pb.BatchTaxPercentage,
    pb.BatchTaxValue,
    
    -- إجمالي القيمة
    ISNULL(pb.BatchValueAfterDiscount, 0) + ISNULL(pb.BatchTaxValue, 0) AS TotalBatchValue,
    
    -- السداد
    pb.Paid,
    (ISNULL(pb.BatchValueAfterDiscount, 0) + ISNULL(pb.BatchTaxValue, 0)) - ISNULL(pb.Paid, 0) AS Remaining,
    
    -- نسبة السداد
    CASE 
        WHEN (ISNULL(pb.BatchValueAfterDiscount, 0) + ISNULL(pb.BatchTaxValue, 0)) > 0 
        THEN (ISNULL(pb.Paid, 0) * 100.0) / (ISNULL(pb.BatchValueAfterDiscount, 0) + ISNULL(pb.BatchTaxValue, 0))
        ELSE 0 
    END AS PaymentPercentage,
    
    -- حالة السداد
    CASE 
        WHEN ISNULL(pb.Paid, 0) = 0 THEN 'غير مسدد'
        WHEN ISNULL(pb.Paid, 0) >= (ISNULL(pb.BatchValueAfterDiscount, 0) + ISNULL(pb.BatchTaxValue, 0)) THEN 'مسدد بالكامل'
        ELSE 'مسدد جزئياً'
    END AS PaymentStatus,
    
    pb.IsDelivered,
    pb.IsDeleted,
    pb.CreatedDate,
    pb.ModifiedDate,
    pb.PaymentDate,
    pb.UserId

FROM PropertyBatch pb
INNER JOIN Property p ON pb.MainDocId = p.Id
WHERE pb.IsDeleted = 0 AND p.IsDeleted = 0

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[vw_PropertyPaymentSummary]
AS
SELECT 
    p.Id AS PropertyId,
    p.Code AS PropertyCode,
    p.ArName AS PropertyName,
    p.ContractValue,
    p.ContractValueWithoutTax,
    p.TaxValue,
    
    -- حسابات الدفعات
    COUNT(pb.Id) AS TotalBatches,
    SUM(CASE WHEN pb.IsDeleted = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ActiveBatches,
    
    -- حسابات السداد
    SUM(CASE WHEN pb.IsDeleted = 0 THEN ISNULL(pb.Paid, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS TotalPaid,
    SUM(CASE WHEN pb.IsDeleted = 0 THEN 
        (ISNULL(pb.BatchValueAfterDiscount, 0) + ISNULL(pb.BatchTaxValue, 0)) - ISNULL(pb.Paid, 0) 
        ELSE 0 END) AS TotalRemaining,
    
    -- إحصائيات الدفعات
    SUM(CASE WHEN pb.IsDeleted = 0 AND ISNULL(pb.Paid, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS UnpaidBatches,
    SUM(CASE WHEN pb.IsDeleted = 0 AND ISNULL(pb.Paid, 0) > 0 
             AND ISNULL(pb.Paid, 0) < (ISNULL(pb.BatchValueAfterDiscount, 0) + ISNULL(pb.BatchTaxValue, 0)) 
        THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS PartiallyPaidBatches,
    SUM(CASE WHEN pb.IsDeleted = 0 AND ISNULL(pb.Paid, 0) >= 
             (ISNULL(pb.BatchValueAfterDiscount, 0) + ISNULL(pb.BatchTaxValue, 0)) 
        THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FullyPaidBatches,
    
    -- تواريخ
    MIN(CASE WHEN pb.IsDeleted = 0 THEN pb.BatchDate END) AS FirstBatchDate,
    MAX(CASE WHEN pb.IsDeleted = 0 THEN pb.BatchDate END) AS LastBatchDate,
    MAX(CASE WHEN pb.IsDeleted = 0 AND ISNULL(pb.Paid, 0) > 0 THEN pb.ModifiedDate END) AS LastPaymentDate,
    
    -- نسب
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN pb.IsDeleted = 0 THEN 
                     ISNULL(pb.BatchValueAfterDiscount, 0) + ISNULL(pb.BatchTaxValue, 0) 
                 ELSE 0 END) > 0 
        THEN (SUM(CASE WHEN pb.IsDeleted = 0 THEN ISNULL(pb.Paid, 0) ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / 
             SUM(CASE WHEN pb.IsDeleted = 0 THEN 
                     ISNULL(pb.BatchValueAfterDiscount, 0) + ISNULL(pb.BatchTaxValue, 0) 
                 ELSE 0 END)
        ELSE 0 
    END AS PaymentPercentage

FROM Property p
LEFT JOIN PropertyBatch pb ON p.Id = pb.MainDocId
WHERE p.IsDeleted = 0
GROUP BY p.Id, p.Code, p.ArName, p.ContractValue, p.ContractValueWithoutTax, p.TaxValue
